ideation: This sequence depicts a superhero pose, starting with arms at the sides and culminating in a confident, powerful stance.  The animation will emphasize a sense of strength and readiness.  The left arm will move into a 'power' pose, while the right arm will remain slightly more relaxed, implying a readiness to act.  The robot's lack of elbows will be compensated for by exaggerated shoulder movements and wrist positioning.  I will utilize both joint1 (roll) and joint2 (pitch) to create dynamic movements, and wrist adjustments will enhance the expressiveness of the pose. Frame 1 will show arms at rest, Frame 2 will initiate the movement of the left arm, Frame 3 will show the left arm in the 'power' pose, and Frame 4 will show the final pose with both arms.

frames.beat: arms hang at the sides, ready for action
left arm begins to rise, a determined gesture
left arm strikes a powerful heroic pose
right arm joins, a confident heroic stance
